mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book_copy (book_id, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{bookId}, 'AVAILABLE', NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE book_copy SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE copy_id = #{copyId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM book_copy WHERE book_id = #{bookId} AND status IN ('RENTED', 'RESERVED')
